professionalSummary: Versatile Data Analyst & Scientist with 5+ years of experience in designing and engineering end-to-end data systems. Proven track record in automating data pipelines, developing high-impact dashboards, and leveraging cloud infrastructure to drive actionable business insights. Highly adaptable with a strong focus on technical scalability, efficiency, and solving complex data challenges.

experience.title: Data Analyst / Data Scientist
experience.company: International Maize and Wheat Improvement Centre (CIMMYT)
responsibilities: Built automated wheat disease surveillance pipeline (Google CSE API → newspaper3k extraction → GROQ LLM classification → SQL/Leaflet dashboards). Processed 2,744+ articles over 303 days; achieved 94% LLM classification success and ~10x noise reduction through iterative prompt engineering.

Standardised multi-country agronomy survey data: designed module structure and naming conventions across 200+ variables; retrospectively harmonised rice (2019–20) and wheat (2018–21) datasets. Published governance documentation used for ongoing CIMMYT form building.

Engineered data pipelines reducing manual processing by 70%+ via Python scheduling, SQL transformations, and dbt workflows. Deployed systems on VPS with Docker containerization and GitHub Actions CI/CD.

Designed and deployed dashboards (Power BI, Dash, Leaflet.js, Highcharts) translating complex agricultural datasets into actionable insights for researchers and government stakeholders across South Asia.

Led digital-first data collection pilots: evaluated tablet-based (KoBoToolbox), sensor-based, and hybrid approaches; selected and scaled cost-optimal solution for groundwater monitoring (gw-nepal.com).

experience.title: Data Manager
responsibilities: Developed and maintained robust data management frameworks for multi-disciplinary research projects, ensuring high-quality reporting for internal and external stakeholders.
Built custom scripts and interactive dashboards to monitor project performance, translating raw data into actionable insights for evaluation teams.

skills: Data Visualization (Dash, Power BI, Leaflet.js, Highcharts)

certifications.name: Introduction to Data Science in Python
Applied Plotting, Charting & Data Representation in Python

publications.title: The optimization of conservation agriculture practices requires attention to location-specific performance

projects.title: Wheat Disease Monitoring Pipeline
projects.description: Automated news surveillance system for South Asia (Google CSE → LLM classification → interactive dashboards). Processed 2,744 articles over 10 months; semantic filtering via GROQ LLM achieved 94% classification success, reducing noise by ~10x. Deployed on VPS with Docker + Python scheduling.

projects.title: LCAS Data Standardisation & Governance
projects.description: Standardized naming conventions and module structure for multi-year, multi-country agronomy surveys (wheat & rice). Harmonized legacy datasets (2018–2021) and published definitive documentation enabling cross-survey interoperability. Still used in CIMMYT form building.

projects.title: Groundwater Monitoring Dashboard
projects.description: Digital data collection system (KoBoToolbox/ODK) replacing paper-based field surveys in Nepal. Built Django/Python dashboards for real-time well location tracking and monthly trend analysis. Eliminated manual data-entry errors and improved transparency.

projects.title: Cricket Ball Tracking System
projects.description: Real-time sports video analysis: two-stage ML pipeline (camera-angle classifier + YOLO ball detection). Custom-trained YOLOv8 models on 374 labeled frames, achieving 100% validation accuracy and 10ms inference latency on Apple Silicon.

projects.title: Cricket Garden
projects.description: Data-driven cricket statistics platform with interactive analysis and visualizations.
